message:
fix(ftui-widgets): stabilize telemetry_emits_in_order test under parallel execution

Rebuild tracing callsite interest cache before each palette operation
that emits telemetry. Parallel workspace tests can poison the global
callsite interest cache, causing info! macros to short-circuit and
miss events. Verified stable across 3 consecutive full workspace runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
